title: sulettaria lambirensis
intro: Sulettaria lambirensis, also known as the African coleus, is a plant species native to tropical Africa, belonging to the Acanthaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve symptoms of indigestion and bloating. The health benefits of Sulettaria lambirensis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and exhibit antibacterial properties. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations such as teas and infusions, and is also used in traditional African medicine to treat various ailments.
